name: dodojo
description: The plugin that audits your plugins. Free until you ask. Zero-token CLI (dj) for stack audit, prune, statusline.

metadata.description: Three-plugin set for Claude Code: dodojo-core (CLI + telemetry), dodojo-guards (safety blockers), dodojo-sensei (ROI advisor). Legacy `dodojo` retained as deprecated meta.

plugins.name: dodojo
plugins.description: [DEPRECATED — install dodojo-core + dodojo-guards + dodojo-sensei] Legacy bundle, retained for back-compat. Empty hooks; nothing fires on install.

plugins.name: dodojo-guards
plugins.description: Standalone assertive guards: secret-guard, force-push-guard, cost-guard. No telemetry, no skills loaded. Zero passive token cost.

plugins.name: dodojo-core
plugins.description: DoDojo core — zero-token `dj` CLI for stack audit/prune, session telemetry, greeter, heartbeat alerts, and maintenance skills (memory curator, surgical-edit, recall, etc).

plugins.name: dodojo-sensei
plugins.description: Meta-organizer that mines work patterns and recommends top-ROI automations. Pairs with dodojo-core (telemetry source).
